title: Jax (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Jax-TCWCEJtB.png|thumb|right|200px|Clone cadet Jax]]
'''Jax''' could refer to:
==Canon==
*'''[[Jax (clone cadet)|Jax]]''', a [[Clone Youth Brigade|clone cadet]]
*'''[[Jax (Mirialan)|Jax]]''', a [[Mirialan]] subject of [[Project Necromancer]]
*'''[[Jax Jerjerrod]]''', son of [[Tiaan Jerjerrod]] and [[First Order]] [[officer]]
*'''[[Jax Torani]]''', member of [[Misha Vontoba]]'s nomads on [[Jakku]]
*'''[[Jaxxon T. Tumperakki]]''', a [[Lepi]] nicknamed "'''Jax'''"
*'''[[Sarlee Jax]]''', associate of [[Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca]] who provided Solo with information about the [[Aloo family]]
*'''[[J-4X]]''', a droid associated with [[Mubo]] and the [[Droid Depot]]
*'''[[J4X-7]]''', [[Jarrod Kelvin|Jarrod Kelvin's]] droid accomplice nicknamed "Jax"

==Legends==
*'''[[Bearded jax/Legends|Bearded jax]]''', a creature
*'''[[Mammoth bearded jax]]''', a creature
*'''[[Psychotic jax]]''', a creature
*'''[[Jax (clone cadet)/Legends|Jax]]''', a [[Clone Youth Brigade/Legends|clone cadet]]
*'''[[Jax (officer)|Jax]]''', a [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]]
*'''[[Jax (Freelie)|Jax]]''', a [[Freelies|Freelie]] leader
*'''[[Jax (Human)|Jax]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]]
*'''[[Jax (street punk)|Jax]]''', a street punk used by [[Mebara Jos]] to hire thugs [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gangers]] to capture [[Di'hal'uma]]
*'''[[Carnor Jax]]''', [[Imperial Sovereign Protector]] and aspirant to the vacant [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] throne
*'''[[Hukta Jax]]''', [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racer]] on the [[Ahto City swoop track]]
*'''[[Moko Jax]]''', owner of [[Moko's Cantina]] on the [[Crystal Web Station]]
*'''[[Jax Dumont]]''', member of the [[Stardogs]] who tasked a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] with rescuing [[Phalanx (individual)|Phalanx]]
*'''[[Jax Keyn]]''', [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrilan]] owner of the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 freighter]] [[Blackjack (YT-1300 light freighter)|''Blackjack'']]
*'''[[Jax Lerrian]]''', [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] inspector during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
*'''[[Jax Norveel]]''', [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] to the fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Zelice Sturm]]
*'''[[Jax Pavan]]''', [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Even Piell/Legends|Even Piell]] who hid in [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] underworld following the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]
**'''[[Jax Pavan (name)]]''', a name shared by the above Jedi and 582,797,753 other [[Coruscanti/Legends|Coruscanti]]
*'''[[Jax Seldam]]''', a nomad [[Sevari]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] contact on [[Sevarcos II]] who assisted in rescuing [[Carter Escalon]]
*'''[[Jax Stog]]''' a Human residing on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] around [[3643 BBY]]
*'''[[Jax (Hutt)|Jax the Hutt]]''', a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] living during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]
*'[[Jaxxon/Legends|''Jaxxon''']], [[Lepi/Legends|Lepi]] smuggler and one of the [[Star-Hoppers of Aduba-3]]
*'''[[Jax Warehouse]]''', a business in [[Hedrett]] owned by [[Manion Basca]]
{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|de=Jax (Begriffsklärung)
|ja=ジャックス
|pl=Jax (strona ujednoznaczniająca)
}}
